# resourceLoadDelegate

**Instance Property**

The receiver’s resource load delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor unowned(unsafe) var resourceLoadDelegate: (any WebResourceLoadDelegate)! { get set }
```

## Discussion

Conforms to the WebResourceLoadDelegate protocol.

## Getting and Setting Delegates

- **downloadDelegate**: The receiver’s download delegate.
- **frameLoadDelegate**: The receiver’s frame load delegate.
- **policyDelegate**: The receiver’s policy delegate.
- **uiDelegate**: The receiver’s user interface delegate.
title: resourceLoadDelegate
